message:
chore(tests): rustfmt formatting fixes across 19 contract test suites

Applies automated rustfmt formatting to contract integration tests. Changes
are purely cosmetic — no logic changes.

Key patterns across all files:
- Multi-argument function calls reformatted with one argument per line
  (TraceEvent::spawn, TraceEvent::complete constructors)
- Long assert! macro bodies with .iter().any() reformatted with proper
  indentation for the closure
- Import ordering normalized (alphabetical within groups)
- Long string expect() calls split across lines
- Trailing comma normalization in assert_eq! macro arguments

Files affected (19):
- adversarial_regime_shift_contract.rs
- authority_flow_audit_contract.rs
- bounded_latency_regression_contract.rs
- capability_token_model_contract.rs
- ci_proof_gates_contract.rs
- claim_evidence_graph_contract.rs
- controller_interference_validation_contract.rs
- controller_sandbox_contract.rs
- cost_capped_exploration_contract.rs
- crash_only_region_contract.rs
- crash_recovery_validation_contract.rs
- cross_track_composition_contract.rs
- failure_domain_contract.rs
- hindsight_logging_nondeterminism_capture_contract.rs
- kernel_fast_path_prototype_contract.rs
- kernel_fast_path_substrate_comparison_contract.rs
- replay_minimization_validation_contract.rs
- transport_frontier_benchmark_contract.rs
- wasm_qa_evidence_matrix_contract.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
